summary: Validated the assigned CLI schema/config assertions with targeted pytest coverage and an isolated Python inspection script; all three assertions passed.

assertions.reason: Targeted pytest passed for required table creation and features.as_of_timestamp enforcement; an isolated SQLite inspection listed games, features, predictions, odds_snapshots, bets, bankroll_ledger, and schema_version, and PRAGMA table_info(features) showed as_of_timestamp as TEXT with NOT NULL set.

Targeted pytest passed for games.game_pk primary key usage and mocked odds ingestion backfill; the isolated inspection showed PRAGMA table_info(games) with game_pk as the primary key and a created game row storing standard abbreviations NYY/BOS via the CLI-facing odds ingestion path.
The targeted config pytest passed, and the isolated YAML inspection confirmed stadiums.OAK uses park_name Sutter Health Park with park_factors.runs 1.25 and park_factors.hr 1.30.
